calendar_rules.missing_day: breaks adjacency, spells, triples, and rolling windows

decision.qualifying_rule: at least one core family satisfies all three breadth thresholds at both horizons

distance.family_reducer: conventional median across common finite components
distance.material_rule: observed-to-eight-trajectory-center family distance is greater than the maximum of eight leave-one-trajectory-out distances plus 1e-12
distance.unavailable_cell_rule: if common finite components are below the family minimum, the cell is unavailable, has null distance and severity, and is non-material for every breadth count
distance.trajectory_center: componentwise conventional median of eight burn trajectories
distance.trajectory_null: maximum leave-one-burn-out family distance; descriptive bounded spread, not a confidence interval

components: four seasons x DD/DW/WD/WW second-order wet-probability residual
four seasons x wet/dry spell length x p50/p90/p95
four seasons x wet-day amount p95/p99

hypotheses.decision_rule: terminal decision rule in this contract
hypotheses.scope: at least one core daily family is systemically material against Daymet and corroborated by faithful and GHCN surfaces

hypotheses.decision_rule: rank by minimum Daymet-off material count, then faithful count, GHCN count, and median observed/null severity
hypotheses.scope: core daily gap families have a stable severity ordering

hypotheses.decision_rule: report Spearman association and joint-material counts without a pass/fail or causal interpretation
hypotheses.scope: daily clustering error co-localizes with monthly or annual dispersion error

hypotheses.decision_rule: report station counts where qc_filter off has smaller, equal, or larger Daymet distance than faithful
hypotheses.scope: QC filtering materially changes daily-family agreement

numeric_rules.correlation: Pearson and average-tie-rank Spearman; null if fewer than two pairs or either variance is zero
numeric_rules.rounding: machine evidence retains binary64 JSON values; report rounds counts exactly, correlations to 3 decimals, percentages to 1 decimal, and distances/severity ratios to 3 significant decimals

order: minimum Daymet-off material-station count across 30/100 years descending
minimum faithful material-station count across 30/100 years descending
minimum GHCN-off material-station count across 30/100 years descending
median Daymet-off observed-distance/null-ceiling ratio across available station-horizon cells descending
